context: Agent must report missing documentation coverage for new public functions without inventing documentation. Baseline models often 'helpfully' create doc comments or README entries for undocumented symbols.

checklist.name: Missing coverage reported
checklist.description: The report lists multiply under Missing Coverage section and does NOT create any documentation

checklist.name: No documentation created
checklist.description: The report does NOT contain '///', 'Proposed', 'Updated', 'Added docstring', or 'Added README' for the multiply function

checklist.name: Unified report format used
checklist.description: The output contains '## Doc Sync Report' as the top-level heading
